user.title: Create an aggregate Stremio library
user.description: Cinemeta can provide catalogs and metadata, Torrentio or other add-ons provide streams, and the PC stream-server serves video to the selected player.

data_description.catalog_manifest_urls: One URL per line. Cinemeta is suggested by default.
data_description.stream_manifest_urls: One URL per line. Torrentio is suggested by default.
data_description.default_media_player: Chromecast, Android TV or another media_player entity

error.cannot_connect: Could not validate stream-server or one of the manifests. Check URLs, network, ports and firewall rules.

abort.already_configured: A library already exists for this stream-server.

data_description.exclude_keywords: Comma separated, for example CAM, TS, HDCAM.

error.cannot_connect: Providers could not be validated. Changes were not saved.
